project_info.name: ADV Cross-Reference Intelligence Platform
project_info.description: Compliance detection system for Form D/ADV cross-reference analysis

session_state.notes: N-PORT isolated live ingestion loaded through 2026Q1 bulk plus Q2-to-date daily catch-up on 2026-05-14. Materialized view refreshed. Full available N-CEN adviser backfill verified on 2026-05-17: 1572 N-CEN records, 15494 adviser-link rows, 1389 registrants linked to ADV CRD, 0 reconcile updates pending. Search/admin triage refinement verified in isolated nport-buildout-claude tree on 2026-05-17.

features.description: N-PORT exposure-ranked search and unresolved issuer triage
acceptance_criteria: Company search uses N-PORT exposure and holder-count stats when available
Homepage high-signal cards surface disclosed exposure, holder count, and latest snapshot date
Admin unresolved queue groups raw holdings by normalized issuer name
Admin triage shows candidate company matches with score and reason
Resolver and scraper alias-cache normalization handle common non-US legal suffixes
SPV unwrap handles multi-word exposure/invested-in names
features.notes: Implemented in isolated nport/ subtree. Verified with 39 Node API tests, 178 Python tests including Postgres-backed integration, and Browser mock smoke for homepage search plus admin suggested matches. Live Supabase preflight not rerun because the restored worktree has no local .env secrets.

features.description: N-PORT dashboard search, sortable tables, and CSV export
acceptance_criteria: Home page defaults to search-first company discovery instead of a long directory
Company current-holders table supports column sorting
Fund private-holdings table supports column sorting
Company page exports current holders to CSV
Company page exports all paginated historical positions to CSV
N-PORT metadata fact band uses neutral styling, reserving color for semantic warnings and deltas
features.notes: Implemented in isolated nport/frontend/nport_pages.js. Browser smoke verified home search, sortable holder headers, current CSV, and all positions CSV. Witness check passed: 166 Python tests, 37 Node route tests, live preflight.

features.description: N-CEN adviser/contact enrichment for N-PORT fund pages and available N-PORT registrants
acceptance_criteria: Preserve per-series N-CEN adviser links via mgmtInvSeriesId
Normalize zero-padded N-CEN CRDs before joining to ADV advisers_enriched
Avoid registrant-level adviser links when a CIK has multiple primary adviser CRDs
Expose fund adviser API routes with ADV contact data
Render adviser/contact panel on fund pages
Load Anthropic holder universe and then backfill all available N-PORT registrant N-CEN filings
Reconcile nport_registrants.adv_crd only when the N-CEN adviser CRD is unambiguous and present in ADV
features.notes: Full available N-CEN backfill verified live: fund_ncen_records=1572, fund_ncen_adviser_links=15494, nport_registrants adv_crd non-null=1389. Reconcile dry-run found 0 pending updates. Remaining 17 registrants were checked against EDGAR and returned skipped_no_ncen. N-CEN tests passed: 21 passed.

acceptance_criteria: Bulk backfill 2019Q4 through 2026Q1
Daily Q2-to-date NPORT-P ingestion
Entity resolution uses live private company aliases
Daily replay has complete fair_value_level coverage
API company position routes work before MV refresh via base-table fallback
Materialized company positions view refreshed
features.notes: Bulk and daily ingestion loaded in pfr-nport through the 2026-05-14 catch-up. Latest live counts: nport_filings=57407, nport_holdings=315872, nport_company_positions_mv=52453. Tests pass, daily coverage checks pass, Anthropic API smoke now uses source=materialized_view with 320 positions and 37 current holders. Fallback reads use 1000-row keyset pages, admin routes require NPORT_ADMIN_TOKEN, and cross-source JWTs were moved to env vars. Production integration remains a separate deploy/mount step.

features.description: Adviser Search - Search and display advisers with filters
ADV Fund Search - Search and display ADV funds with pagination
Form D Search - Search and display Form D filings sorted by date
New Managers Tab - Display new fund managers with expandable rows

acceptance_criteria: Query all advisers with overdue_adv_flag=true
Paginate through all records
Deduplicate by adviser CRD
Find advisers claiming VC exemption
Check if they manage non-VC funds
Store fund types in metadata
Compare fund type in Form D vs ADV
Paginate through ALL 63k records
Store both types in metadata
Compare 3(c)(1) and 3(c)(7) between Form D and ADV
Paginate through ALL records
Handle different exemption formats

features.description: Needs Initial ADV Filing detector with database validation
acceptance_criteria: Find Form D filings with no ADV match within 60 days
Extract manager names using parseFundName()
Validate against advisers_enriched using base name extraction
Only flag managers NOT found in database
features.notes: Fixed false positive rate from 78% to 0%. Validated 200 managers: 147 registered (73.5%), 53 need ADV (26.5%). Added extractBaseName() and checkAdvDatabase() functions. See docs/ADV_VALIDATION_MAPPING.md

features.description: Frontend - Fund types in VC violations
acceptance_criteria: Show fund type badges (PE, Hedge, etc.)
Display sample non-VC funds from metadata

features.description: Frontend - EDGAR links for Form D mismatches
acceptance_criteria: Generate EDGAR links from accession number
Display alongside ADV IAPD links

features.description: Frontend - Adviser detail from Intelligence Radar
acceptance_criteria: Click adviser loads detail page
Loading spinner during fetch
URL navigation works
features.notes: Added loading_adviser state - verify in browser

acceptance_criteria: Improve match rate beyond 28%
Better fuzzy matching
Handle entity variations
Clean up bad article URLs
Improve website extraction accuracy
Handle edge cases
features.notes: Some enriched managers have article URLs

known_issues.description: Mixed date formats in Form D
ADV validation false positives (GP entity name != registered adviser name)
known_issues.resolution: Added extractBaseName() and checkAdvDatabase() functions. Validates against advisers_enriched database before flagging. Reduced false positive rate from 78% to 0%. See docs/ADV_VALIDATION_MAPPING.md (2026-01-07)

Load N-CSR acquisition cost/date enrichment for major holders
Load N-1A portfolio manager extraction for priority fund families
Compute position deltas and surface coordinated repricing events

Set production env vars before any main-app mount: SUPABASE_URL_NPORT, SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY_NPORT, NPORT_ADMIN_TOKEN, ADV_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, FORMD_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
Merge the intentional one-line N-PORT mount into the main PFR app only when ready for production review
Run post-merge production smoke checks on privatefundsradar.com
Verify frontend displays in browser (fund types, EDGAR links, adviser loading)
Run updated detect_compliance_issues.js to validate ADV filing detector accuracy
